hero.subtitle: The ultimate cloud platform for leading dental practices. Automate workflows, harness AI-driven treatment planning, and maximize your profitability effortlessly.
hero.clinicOwnerDesc: Take the lead. Manage your clinic centrally, monitor financial performance in real-time, and drive your team towards excellence.
hero.staffMemberDesc: Log in to your smart workspace. Manage your appointments and patient records seamlessly and efficiently.

features.title: A Complete Ecosystem with No Limits
features.subtitle: We've crafted exceptional AI-powered tools to simplify management, eliminate financial waste, and elevate the patient experience.
features.f1Desc: Say goodbye to no-shows. Our system sends intelligent automated reminders via WhatsApp and SMS to ensure maximum daily productivity.
features.f2Desc: Medical history, treatment plans, and X-rays in one secure hub. Instant access from any device for faster, more accurate care.
features.f3Desc: Total control over cash flow. One-click invoicing, outstanding balance tracking, and performance reports that reveal growth opportunities (ROI).
features.f4Desc: Smart management for medical supplies. Get early low-stock alerts to prevent any sudden operational halts.

howItWorks.title: Your Path to a Fully Digital Clinic
howItWorks.subtitle: A seamless transition. Start managing your clinic professionally in 3 simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Register your clinic in minutes, add your logo, and precisely define your services and pricing to build your digital identity.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Invite doctors, assistants, and receptionists. Assign precise permissions to ensure secure and efficient workflows.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Welcome patients, issue invoices, and monitor your clinic's growth through advanced interactive dashboards.

pricing.title: A Strategic Investment That Grows With You
pricing.subtitle: Transparent, well-thought-out plans. Choose the tier that will lead your clinic to the top.

basic.name: Basic
basic.desc: The perfect choice for emerging clinics seeking reliable automation and a strong start.

pro.name: Professional
pro.desc: The comprehensive ecosystem for leading medical centers seeking operational excellence.

footer.desc: The next generation of dental practice management. Building tools that help clinicians focus on what matters most: patient care.
